economic_notes: Arrowhead Development Corporation (GBE) consolidated with 6089292 Manitoba Ltd., Keeshkeemaquah Hotels Inc., Keeshkeemaquah Limited Partnership, Ado Aki Inc., Long Plain General Partner Inc. and National Indigenous Residential School Museum. Long Plain Irrigation Management Company Ltd. consolidated. LPFNT Landholdings Inc. consolidated. Hotel located in Winnipeg. Defined contribution pension plan covering substantially all full-time employees.
notes: Long Plain First Nation is located in Manitoba (not Alberta). The net debt figure of -49,141,472 represents net debt (negative net financial assets) per the Statement of Change in Net Debt. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($49,795,563) + CMHC ($5,882,442) + First Peoples Development Inc. ($911,582) + Municipal tax sharing grant ($49,044) + Dakota Ojibway Child and Family Services ($6,132) + Assembly of Manitoba Chiefs ($140,000) + Southern Chiefs Organization ($35,750) = $56,820,513 plus Manitoba First Nations Education Resource Centre and other small items not clearly separable. OSR estimated as remaining revenue after government transfers. Deferred revenue movements are large (over $21M drawn down and $15.8M released), consistent with PS 3410 adoption effective April 1, 2023. Arrowhead Development Corporation is the single GBE accounted for by modified equity method. 11 entities/departments are fully consolidated. No schedule of remuneration was included in the extracted text. Tangible capital assets net book value not extractable from provided text. Current liabilities and long-term debt balances not fully provided in extracted text.
